summary: Tested Text Templates (Textbausteine) feature for Vortext/Schlusstext. All features working correctly. Backend API 100% passing (16/16 tests). Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor now has vortext/schlusstext fields with TextTemplateSelect integration. Settings page TextTemplateManagement working correctly with CRUD operations.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/text-templates returns templates
Backend: GET /api/text-templates?doc_type=angebot filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/text-templates?text_type=vortext filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/text-templates/placeholders returns 7 placeholders
Backend: POST /api/text-templates creates template
Backend: POST /api/text-templates with invalid doc_type returns 400
Backend: POST /api/text-templates with invalid text_type returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/text-templates/{id} updates template
Backend: PUT /api/text-templates/non-existent returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/text-templates/{id} deletes template
Backend: DELETE /api/text-templates/non-existent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/quotes accepts vortext and schlusstext
Backend: PUT /api/quotes/{id} saves vortext and schlusstext
Backend: POST /api/invoices accepts vortext and schlusstext
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} saves vortext and schlusstext
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Vortext field visible (data-testid=input-vortext)
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Schlusstext field visible (data-testid=input-schlusstext)
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Template dropdown button for vortext (data-testid=btn-template-dropdown-vortext)
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Template dropdown button for schlusstext (data-testid=btn-template-dropdown-schlusstext)
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Template dropdown shows available templates
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Selecting template fills text field with resolved placeholders
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Placeholder {kunde_name} resolved correctly to customer name
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Vortext/Schlusstext visible on /quotes/new
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Vortext/Schlusstext visible on /invoices/new
Frontend WysiwygDocumentEditor: Saved vortext/schlusstext loaded when editing existing quote
Frontend Settings: TextTemplateManagement section visible (data-testid=text-template-management)
Frontend Settings: Tabs for Angebot/Auftragsbestätigung/Rechnung work correctly
Frontend Settings: Can create new template via modal
Frontend Settings: Template modal has title, content fields and placeholder buttons
Frontend Settings: Edit and delete buttons visible on templates
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST quote and TEST_Rechnung Vortext template during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Text Templates feature fully implemented and working. WysiwygDocumentEditor now has vortext/schlusstext fields with TextTemplateSelect component. Settings page has TextTemplateManagement at the bottom with tabs for Angebot/Auftragsbestätigung/Rechnung. Existing templates: 2 Vortexte for Angebot (Frau/Herr versions), 1 Schlusstext for Angebot. No templates for Auftragsbestätigung or Rechnung by default. Placeholder resolution works correctly ({kunde_name}, {kunde_adresse}, {kunde_email}, {kunde_telefon}, {firma}, {datum}, {dokument_nr}).
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iteration_14 found that WysiwygDocumentEditor was missing vortext/schlusstext fields. Main agent fixed this by integrating TextTemplateSelect component into WysiwygDocumentEditor.jsx. The fix was successful - all vortext/schlusstext functionality now works correctly in the document editor.
